entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum studied for smut susceptibility

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: The fungal pathogen Tolyposporium penicillariae that causes smut disease

entities.name: CMS-MEDIATED MALE STERILITY
entities.description: Male sterility based on A1 cytoplasmic-nuclear interaction

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Pearl millet varieties used as a baseline for smut susceptibility

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: A-lines used in the creation of hybrids

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: B-lines used as counterparts to male-sterile lines

entities.name: SMUT SEVERITY
entities.description: The measure of smut infection levels in pearl millet hybrids

entities.name: GENETIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherited ability of parental lines to resist smut infection

entities.name: SELFED SEEDSET
entities.description: The proportion of seeds produced via self-pollination

entities.name: A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: The specific cytoplasm associated with male sterility in pearl millet
